title: senecio mirus
intro: Senecio mirus, also known as the woolly senecio, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Senecio mirus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Senecio mirus, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
